lines.speaker: Lord Ieuan Amlodd
lines.text: Good day [player name]. Have you come to hear the song of the elves?

lines.speaker: Lord Ieuan Amlodd
lines.text: Do you not hear it? The sounds of a city in harmony. It is the song of the elves, the story of our people.

lines.speaker: Lord Ieuan Amlodd
lines.text: The last few verses were dark and quiet, but now our city is restored, we find ourselves singing a new verse, one of joy and light.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. I guess I've never been the type to reflect on that sort of thing.

lines.speaker: Lord Ieuan Amlodd
lines.text: More of a fighter? We have a song for that too. If you wish to sing it, head to the Gauntlet and put yourself to the test.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I might just give it a shot. Thanks.
